description: Quality-of-Life Fixes - address broken tests, CI config errors, navigation dead-ends, visual inconsistencies, minor bugs, and dead code identified in a codebase review

userStories.title: Fix HomePageTests for merged Learning menu group
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the home page E2E tests to reflect the current 4-group menu structure so that CI passes.
acceptanceCriteria: HomePageTests asserts exactly 4 .menu-group elements (previously 5)
The 4th group (Learning) is asserted to contain exactly 2 .menu-button elements (Phonics + Learning Cards)
All separate assertions for a 5th group are removed
All existing home page tests still pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix invalid GitHub Actions versions in CI workflow
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the CI workflow to use valid action versions so that deployments don't fail at the checkout or setup step.
acceptanceCriteria: actions/checkout@v6 changed to actions/checkout@v4 in .github/workflows/deploy-to-github-pages.yml
actions/setup-dotnet@v5 changed to actions/setup-dotnet@v4 in the same file
Workflow file is valid YAML with no syntax errors
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix ScheduleDisplay to look up images across all categories
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the schedule display to find images from any category so that images are never silently missing.
acceptanceCriteria: ScheduleDisplay.razor.cs calls GetAllImagesAsync() (or equivalent) instead of GetImagesByCategoryAsync(ImageCategory.Places)
If GetAllImagesAsync() does not exist on IImageStorageService, add it to the interface and implementation
Images still display correctly when navigating from PlanDay with valid Places IDs
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix redundant ternary in selection count labels
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the selection count label logic to be simple and readable so that the intent is clear.
acceptanceCriteria: FoodChoices.razor selection label ternary simplified to: SelectedImages.Count == 1 ? "item selected (need 2+)" : "items selected"
ActivityChoices.razor selection label ternary simplified the same way
Displayed text is unchanged for all counts: 0 shows 'items selected', 1 shows 'item selected (need 2+)', 2+ shows 'items selected'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix stale Browse My Pictures link in Favorites empty state
userStories.description: As a user, I want the empty-state call-to-action in Favorites to take me somewhere useful so that I'm not sent to an orphaned legacy page.
acceptanceCriteria: The <a href='my-pictures'> link in Favorites.razor empty state is replaced with a link to '/' (home) labelled 'Go to Home' or similar
The link renders correctly in the empty-state section with minimum 48px touch target
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Style the NotFound page to match the app design
userStories.description: As a user who lands on a 404, I want to see a calm, styled page with a way to get home so that I'm not confused by an unstyled HTML fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: NotFound.razor has a page title, calm background colour, and styled text consistent with other pages
Page includes a clearly visible 'Go Home' link or button that navigates to '/'
Page uses calm-* Tailwind classes, not plain unstyled HTML
Home link has a minimum 48px touch target
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix ScheduleDisplay auto-advance toggle label
userStories.description: As a user, I want the auto-advance toggle to clearly indicate what will happen when I press it so that I'm not confused about the current mode.
acceptanceCriteria: When auto-advance is ON: button label remains 'Auto' (no change needed)
When auto-advance is OFF: button label changed from 'Static' to 'Auto' with a play icon (pressing it enables auto-advance)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix food empty-state icon from dollar-coin to food icon
userStories.description: As a user, I want the food library and food choices empty states to show a relevant food icon so that the page looks intentional.
acceptanceCriteria: FoodLibrary.razor empty-state SVG replaced with the same apple/food icon used on the Home page Food menu button (path: M12 2c1 0 2 1 2 2s-1 2-2 2 / M12 6c-4 0-7 3-7 8s3 8 7 8...)
FoodChoices.razor empty-state SVG replaced with the same food icon
The dollar-coin SVG path (M12 8c-1.657 0-3 .895-3 2...M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0...) no longer appears in either file
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix Upload page success and error message colours
userStories.description: As a user, I want the upload success and error messages to use the app's calm colour palette so that they don't look visually jarring.
acceptanceCriteria: .success-message in Upload.razor uses #6B9A7D (calm-success) for border and text colour, consistent with Settings.razor success message styling
.error-message in Upload.razor uses #D4A06A (calm-warning/amber) for border and text colour instead of #E65100
Neither #2E7D32 nor #E65100 remain in Upload.razor's style block
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix Places library empty-state copy
userStories.description: As a user viewing the empty Places library, I want the hint text to accurately describe what to add so that I'm not confused by a reference to Activities.
acceptanceCriteria: PlacesLibrary.razor empty-state paragraph changed from 'Add pictures of places and activities...' to 'Add pictures of places to use in your daily schedule.'
MyPictures.razor Places tab empty-state paragraph updated with the same correction (the line reads 'Add pictures of places and activities to use in your daily schedule.')
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix Learning pages horizontal padding to match all other pages
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Learning pages to use the same horizontal padding as all other pages so that the layout is consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: LearningCategories.razor header/content div class changed from px-6 sm:px-8 to px-4 sm:px-6
LearningCardGrid.razor header/content div class changed from px-6 sm:px-8 to px-4 sm:px-6
No other layout changes made to these pages
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Remove unused Bootstrap CSS
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Bootstrap CSS bundle removed from the app so that ~200KB of unused CSS isn't downloaded on every page load.
acceptanceCriteria: The <link rel='stylesheet' href='lib/bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css' /> line removed from wwwroot/index.html
Any --bs-* CSS variable references in app.css replaced with hard-coded values (specifically --bs-secondary-color on approximately line 182)
App visually unchanged after removal — no unstyled elements
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Remove dead MyPictures page and its route aliases
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the orphaned MyPictures.razor page removed so that the codebase doesn't contain unreachable routes and legacy UI missing the Activities category.
acceptanceCriteria: MyPictures.razor file deleted
@page "/my-pictures" and @page "/my-pictures/{Tab}" route directives removed from PlacesLibrary.razor
@page "/my-pictures/food" route directive removed from FoodLibrary.razor
No remaining references to /my-pictures anywhere in the project (grep for 'my-pictures' returns no results in src/ or tests/)
Typecheck passes
